info.title: CodeCoverageSummary
info.description:
NOTE: Forked from https://github.com/irongut/CodeCoverageSummary to enable publishing as a .NET Global Tool.

    A GitHub Action that reads Cobertura format code coverage files and outputs a text or markdown summary.

options.name: --files
options.description:
Required. A comma separated list of code coverage files to
analyse. Also accepts glob patterns.

options.name: --badge
options.description:
(Default: false) Include a Line Rate coverage badge in the
output using shields.io - true or false.

options.name: --fail
options.description:
(Default: false) Fail if overall Line Rate below lower
threshold - true or false.

options.name: --format
options.description: (Default: text) Output Format - markdown or text.

options.name: --hidebranch
options.description:
(Default: false) Hide Branch Rate values in the output -
true or false.

options.name: --hidecomplexity
options.description: (Default: false) Hide Complexity values in the output -

options.name: --indicators
options.description: (Default: true) Include health indicators in the output -

options.name: --output
options.description: (Default: console) Output Type - console, file or both.

options.name: --thresholds
options.description:
(Default: 50 75) Threshold percentages for badge and
health indicators, lower threshold can also be used to
fail the action.
